final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing hand-drawn infographic explaining the definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, and CLI, intended for educational sharing.

Style/medium: hand-drawn infographic, sketchbook aesthetic with mixed illustrations and diagrams
Composition: central concept map layout with AI at the center, related concepts branching outward, visual connectors showing relationships between nodes
Subject: concept definitions — AI (artificial intelligence), MCP (Model Context Protocol), AI Agent (autonomous AI system), OpenClaw (AI agent framework), AI Skill (modular AI capability), distillation (model compression technique), CLI (command-line interface); each concept illustrated with simple icons and brief explanatory text
Scene/backdrop: light paper texture background resembling a notebook page
Lighting/mood: friendly, approachable, educational
Color palette: warm muted tones with accent colors for concept categories
Materials/textures: pencil/pen sketch lines, watercolor washes, paper grain
Text (verbatim): AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI
Constraints: all 7 concepts must be visually present, relationships between concepts must be clear through connecting lines or grouping, text must be legible at infographic scale
Avoid: overly technical diagrams, cluttered layouts, corporate flat design aesthetic
